# Warp

> Distributed job processing, message queue, and in-memory mediator library for .NET 10. Three patterns, one unified pipeline, a real-time dashboard.

Warp ships as three NuGet packages: Moberg.Warp.Core (publishing), Moberg.Warp.Worker (processing), and Moberg.Warp.UI (dashboard). Supports PostgreSQL and SQL Server. Uses the transactional outbox pattern — jobs are committed atomically with your business data.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/getting-started): Installation, DbContext setup, service registration, first handler
- [Messages](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/patterns/messages): Pub/sub IMessage with multiple handlers, fan-out routing
- [Jobs](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/patterns/jobs): IJob with scheduling, retries, continuations, batches, named queues, mutex
- [Requests](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/patterns/requests): In-memory IRequest<TResponse> via IMediator.Send(), no persistence
- [Patterns Overview](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/patterns): Type hierarchy, unified pipeline behaviors
- [Outbox Pattern](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/features/outbox-pattern): Transactional outbox — jobs committed with business data
- [Recurring Jobs](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/features/recurring-jobs): Cron-based scheduling, deduplication, execution history
- [Job Metadata](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/features/metadata): Key-value metadata, publish pipeline behaviors, IJobContext
- [Mutex](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/features/mutex): ConcurrencyKey-based mutual exclusion for jobs
- [Job Cancellation](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/features/cancellation): Graceful CancellationMode, handler CancellationToken
- [Pause / Resume](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/features/pause): Pause servers and worker groups, resume processing
- [Job Tracing](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/features/tracing): TraceId and SpawnedByJobId for cross-job flow visibility
- [Configuration](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/operations/configuration): Worker, polling, retention, dispatcher mode, worker groups, schema, naming conventions
- [Crash Recovery](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/operations/crash-recovery): Sliding invisibility timeout, keep-alive, stale job recovery
- [Dashboard Auth](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/docs/operations/dashboard-auth): IWarpAuthorizationFilter, built-in login, cookie auth

## Optional

- [Full AI Reference](https://moberghr.github.io/warp/llms-full.txt): Complete self-contained reference with all patterns, API, configuration, and examples
